quotes.quote: This initial review, which doesn’t use external tools like web search, aims to quickly discard flawed, non-novel, or otherwise unsuitable hypotheses.
quotes.rationale: A tool-free initial review that discards hypotheses is an implemented stage gate on novelty and soundness.

quotes.quote: The Reflection agent searches relevant prior work (via web search or a dedicated scientist-provided repository), assesses existing experimental evidence for or against a given hypothesis, and rigorously verifies the novelty, correctness, and quality of generated outputs.
quotes.rationale: Named agent judging novelty, correctness and quality using retrieved prior work.

quotes.quote: Context memory. In order to enable iterative computation and scientific reasoning over long time horizons, the co-scientist uses a persistent context memory to store and retrieve states of the agents and the system during the course of the computation.
quotes.rationale: Agent and system states including reviews are persisted, supporting a memory_update path.

quotes.quote: Evolution agent. The co-scientist’s iterative improvement capability relies heavily on this agent, which continuously refines the top-ranked hypotheses emerging from the tournament.
quotes.rationale: Tournament ranking determines which hypotheses are refined, so its output steers the search.

quotes.quote: Note that the Elo metric is auto-evaluated and not based on independent ground truth.
quotes.rationale: The source states the ranking metric is self-evaluated without independent ground truth.

quotes.quote: The co-scientist’s hypotheses for these three settings are externally, independently validated by in vitro laboratory experiments and detailed in separate preprints co-timed with this work.
quotes.rationale: In vitro validation is described as external and independent and reported in separate preprints.

quotes.quote: This work does not aim to completely automate the scientific process with AI. Instead, the co-scientist is purpose-built for a “scientist-in-the-loop” collaborative paradigm, to help domain experts augment their hypothesis generation process and guide the exploration that follows.
quotes.rationale: Domain experts guide the exploration, giving human judgment a control role over the search.

diagnostics.consequence: Closed LLM-on-LLM search control may amplify model preferences rather than scientific merit, so reported quality gains cannot be attributed to genuine improvement.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Note that the Elo metric is auto-evaluated and not based on independent ground truth.
Evolution agent. The co-scientist’s iterative improvement capability relies heavily on this agent, which continuously refines the top-ranked hypotheses emerging from the tournament.

diagnostics.statement: The tournament Elo signal that drives ranking and selects hypotheses for refinement is explicitly self-evaluated without independent ground truth, and no discrimination or agreement study is reported for it.

diagnostics.consequence: False-negative discards at the stage gate cannot be bounded, so the recall of the ideation pipeline is unknown.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: This initial review, which doesn’t use external tools like web search, aims to quickly discard flawed, non-novel, or otherwise unsuitable hypotheses.

The Reflection agent searches relevant prior work (via web search or a dedicated scientist-provided repository), assesses existing experimental evidence for or against a given hypothesis, and rigorously verifies the novelty, correctness, and quality of generated outputs.

diagnostics.statement: No reliability study is reported for the LLM screening and reflection channels that judge novelty and correctness, although the screening gate irreversibly discards hypotheses.

diagnostics.consequence: The strongest evidence channel is open-loop and cannot correct internal ranking, leaving the automated loop effectively validated only by itself.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: The co-scientist’s hypotheses for these three settings are externally, independently validated by in vitro laboratory experiments and detailed in separate preprints co-timed with this work.
Importantly, this example does not aim to suggest potential therapeutic avenues for ALS and should be interpreted with utmost caution.

diagnostics.statement: The only independent empirical validation is in vitro work reported in separate preprints, and the packet does not report that those results are routed back into the system; the source also cautions against interpreting outputs substantively.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Note that the Elo metric is auto-evaluated and not based on independent ground truth.

recommendations.proposed_action: Run and report a discrimination study comparing tournament Elo rankings against an independent, non-model ground truth on a held-out hypothesis set before treating Elo as evidence of quality.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Statistically significant positive correlation versus a random-ranking baseline
success_check.evidence_needed: Published study reporting the held-out set, labeling protocol and correlation statistics
success_check.observable: Rank correlation between Elo and independently sourced quality labels

exact_quotes.exact_quote: This initial review, which doesn’t use external tools like web search, aims to quickly discard flawed, non-novel, or otherwise unsuitable hypotheses.

recommendations.proposed_action: Measure and publish false-discard rates for the tool-free initial screening gate by re-reviewing a sample of discarded hypotheses with the full reflection review and expert judgment.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Reported with confidence intervals against a pre-stated acceptable false-discard threshold
success_check.evidence_needed: Sampling protocol, re-review labels and per-stage retention statistics
success_check.observable: Proportion of screened-out hypotheses subsequently judged novel and sound

exact_quotes.exact_quote: The co-scientist’s hypotheses for these three settings are externally, independently validated by in vitro laboratory experiments and detailed in separate preprints co-timed with this work.

recommendations.proposed_action: State explicitly whether in vitro validation outcomes are fed back into ranking or context memory, and document the routing if such a path exists.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Explicit statement of the feedback path, or explicit statement that none exists
success_check.evidence_needed: System description or execution trace showing assay results entering or absent from the loop
success_check.observable: Documented routing of assay outcomes into system state or ranking

memory_structure: persistent context memory storing agent and system states over long time horizons
tournament state / Elo ratings over hypotheses
policy_type: multi-agent specialized pipeline with generation, reflection, tournament ranking and evolution stages
tournament-ranked iterative refinement of top-ranked hypotheses
